emails.subject: Re: Ormet Documents
emails.body: Re: Ormet Documents Dan I accept the terms of the confidentiality agreement, so please feel free to execute so that we can see the Ormet financials. With respect to the Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement, I realize that we have yet to determine the final collateral threshold amount (hence the need for Ormet's financials). However, I would like to point out that Paragraph 4.3 has a typo with respect to the Customer's threshold. The figure should be "$1,500,000" but currently reads "1,5000,000" (with an extra zero). Just in case we should settle on a $1.5 MM threshold, we need to ensure that this is corrected. Thanks, Jay Williams Dan J Hyvl@ECT 12/12/2000 11:07 AM

emails.subject: Re: Ormet Documents
